gt_sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' ORDER BY T1.weight_kg DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics'
ORDER BY s.weight_kg DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: Identify the heaviest superhero in DC Comics.
